reviews.review_description:
worst game ever it’s not online and plus you don’t have a character to customize 
🤬🤬🤬😤😡😡🤬🥵

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying the game and giving an honest review. The paid multiplayer version called 'Hex7 - Battle Arena - Multiplayer' includes both multiplayer features and character customization. If you have other issues with the game, such as the core mechanics of the game, you will still be disappointed as it is basically the same gameplay.
